title: CheckoutRecommendation
description: A single safe-to-pay recommendation for a checkout moment (Module 5, FR-PAY-001). Names ONE payment method (a card or an account) justified by reward value AND runway safety AND utilization effect together (SC-P-002). Recommend-only: FinOS never moves money (Constitution IV, FR-X-003). MUST NOT name a method that introduces a new runway shortfall or pushes utilization > 50% (hard-avoid). Reward value is CONSUMED already-valued from Rewards (BestCardRecommendation/PointsValuation), never re-derived. All money fields are integer minor units (cents); the utilization guardrail follows CreditState bands with the documented-default exception (Constitution VI v2.2.0). Provided to Bills, Cash Safety, Shopping, and Tasks.

profile_id.description: Owning profile; every cross-profile read is authZ-checked server-side on session identity, never on this client-supplied value (threat model).

merchant_id.description: Identity from MerchantGraph; not re-resolved here.

checkout_amount.description: The checkout amount applied as an outflow when testing runway safety. Foreign-currency amounts are FX-converted to CAD (arbitrary precision, half-up at the final cent) before reasoning; a stale FX rate withholds (see freshness).

recommended_method.description: Exactly ONE method. MUST NOT be a method whose projected per-card or aggregate utilization exceeds 50%, nor one that introduces a new runway shortfall_flag.

method_type.description: card ⇒ method_id is a CardLineup card_id; account ⇒ method_id is an AccountState account_id.

net_reward_value.description: Net CAD reward value of the recommended method for this checkout (reward consumed from Rewards minus known FX/fee costs), integer cents. Summed in integer cents; rate products computed in arbitrary precision and rounded half-up once before inclusion.

reward_foregone.description: Present ONLY when the reward-optimal method was overridden for safety: the CAD reward given up by choosing the safer method instead (integer cents). Drives the trade-off display (SC-P-003).

utilization_warning.description: true iff the recommended card's projected per-card or aggregate utilization lands in the 30-50% warn band. Always false for an account method.

utilization_source.description: assumed_healthy_default when CreditState was ENTIRELY ABSENT (FR-PAY-001; Constitution VI v2.2.0 documented-default exception). Present-but-stale CreditState withholds instead, so it never produces assumed_healthy_default.

runway_safe.description: true iff applying checkout_amount as an outflow keeps the spine CashFlowForecast projected_lowest_balance at or above the user's safety buffer (no new shortfall_flag). A runway-unsafe method is never the recommended_method; this asserts the chosen method is safe.

safe_to_act_deferred.description: true iff Cash Safety's SafeToActSignal overrode a spend-positive pick; pairs with the Conflict Banner (ux-foundations §3.1). Cash Safety has documented precedence over Pay optimization.

trade_off_en.description: Bilingual trade-off note (EN) shown when reward_foregone is present; null when no override occurred.

trade_off_fr.description: Bilingual trade-off note (FR); a missing fr note when an en note exists is a bilingual defect (Constitution II).

reasoning.description: MUST cite reward value, runway impact (projected lowest balance after spend), and utilization effect (before/after band) in inputs, with bilingual rationale (SC-P-002/003).

freshness.description: Aggregate freshness of the money inputs this recommendation was computed on (runway/budget/reward). A stale primary money input WITHHOLDS the recommendation rather than emitting a CheckoutRecommendation with is_stale=true (Constitution IV/VI/VIII).
